Guidance for further developing Flask applications with additional features and resources.

# Purpose
This document provides guidance for developers who have completed a Flask tutorial and are looking to further develop their skills and projects. It encourages developers to review their learning progress and compare their work with an example project. The document highlights additional resources, such as the Flask quickstart guide and documentation for related tools like `Jinja`, `Click`, `Werkzeug`, and `ItsDangerous`. It also suggests several enhancements for the Flaskr project, including adding features like a detail view for posts, post interactions such as likes and comments, tagging, search functionality, pagination, image uploads, Markdown formatting, and an RSS feed. These suggestions aim to inspire developers to expand their applications and continue learning.
